examples:
Command Example
gcs-delete-bucket bucket_name=my-bucket force=true
Human Readable Output
Bucket my-bucket was deleted successfully.
5. Retrieve a list of objects in a bucket
Retrieves the list of objects in a bucket.
Base Command
gcs-list-bucket-objects

Command Example
gcs-list-bucket-objects bucket_name=my-bucket prefix=some/path/ delimiter=/
Human Readable Output
Objects in bucket my-bucket
Name
Bucket
Content Type
Time Created
name: gcs-list-bucket-objects

outputs.description: Object name. GCS.BucketObject.Bucket Name of the bucket containing the object.
outputs.name: GCS.BucketObject.Name

outputs.description: Content-Type of the object data. GCS.BucketObject.TimeCreated Date
outputs.name: GCS.BucketObject.ContentType

outputs.description: GCS.BucketObject.TimeUpdated Date Last time object was modified.
outputs.name: Object creation time.

outputs.description: Date Object deletion time (available if the object is archived). GCS.BucketObject.Size
outputs.name: GCS.BucketObject.TimeDeleted

outputs.description: Object size in bytes. GCS.BucketObject.MD5 MD5 hash of the data in Base64.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Object owner ID. GCS.BucketObject.CRC32c CRC32c checksum (as described in
outputs.name: GCS.BucketObject.OwnerID

outputs.description: ), encoded using Base64 in big-endian byte order. GCS.BucketObject.EncryptionAlgorithm The encryption algorithm.
outputs.name: RFC 4960, Appendix B

outputs.description: SHA256 hash value of the encryption key.
outputs.name: GCS.BucketObject.EncryptionKeySHA256
